meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills: Debugging for Freelancers (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to ship faster, debug complex logic, and impress your clients. Advanced workflow inside.
content.answer_block: To eliminate debugging bottlenecks, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate root-cause analysis. By injecting specific architectural constraints into your CLI workflows, you transform manual troubleshooting into an autonomous loop. This setup allows you to resolve complex logic errors in seconds, ensuring you meet client deadlines with production-grade reliability.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. You’ve been staring at a recursive stack trace for three hours, and the professional facade of your freelance business is starting to crack. The difference between a struggling coder and a top-tier AI builder isn't the ability to memorize syntax; it's the ability to orchestrate machines to solve problems for you.

We are moving beyond basic prompting. By marrying the surgical precision of Claude Code with the architectural oversight of Antigravity, you create a feedback loop that treats your codebase as a living, self-healing entity. This guide is your blueprint for reclaiming your time and delivering flawless, high-value code at scale.

steps.title: Initialize the Contextual Bridge
steps.description: Establish a secure bridge between your local environment and Claude Code to ensure the AI has full visibility into your project's dependency graph.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and map all critical dependency chains. Identify potential points of failure in the authentication middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config set --context-aware true && claude init

steps.title: Automated Root-Cause Diagnostic
steps.description: Use Antigravity to isolate the specific logic error before invoking Claude to fix it, preventing recursive hallucination.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Trace the error in the current execution flow. Provide the exact file and line number causing the state mutation mismatch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file [file_path] --task 'Apply fix based on the isolated root cause identified by Antigravity'

steps.title: Implement Unit Test Guards
steps.description: Before applying a fix, generate a test suite that enforces the expected behavior, ensuring no regressions are introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test suite for the identified bug that fails on the current logic and passes on the expected output.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate unit tests for the identified bug and save to __tests__/bugfix.test.js'

steps.title: Surgical Code Refactoring
steps.description: Execute the fix using Claude Code with a 'minimal change' constraint to maintain architectural integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the logic in the target file to resolve the bug while maintaining the existing architectural pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Fix the bug in [file_path] using the minimal diff approach'

steps.title: Validation and Deployment Loop
steps.description: Verify the fix against the new unit tests and commit the changes directly to your feature branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the fix against the new unit tests and provide a summary of the changes for the client documentation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Run all tests and commit with a standard semantic message'

pro_tips: Always set your 'max_tokens' to a higher threshold during deep debugging sessions to avoid truncated logic explanations.
Use Antigravity's 'ghost mode' to simulate edge cases against your codebase before letting Claude touch the production files.
Maintain a .claudeignore file that excludes massive build artifacts to keep the context window focused on your source logic.
Alias your most common Claude CLI commands to your shell profile to shave off seconds of typing time per session.
Always ask Claude to explain its 'reasoning path' before it writes code to catch logic errors before they are committed.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is stabilized, start building a library of custom 'Antigravity Recipes'—reusable prompt templates for common bugs that you encounter across different client projects.
content.conversion_block: You now have the power to turn a terminal full of errors into a competitive advantage. Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
